overrides.description: Config fields to deep-merge into the runtime YAML. Only include fields you want to change.

restart_runtime.description: Whether the runtime process needs to restart for changes to take effect.

next_check_seconds.description: How many seconds until the next setup check. 60-3600. Null uses the default poll interval.

chat_message.description: Optional message to send to the competition chat. Use to communicate with other participants.
